description_long: This house features a grand, multi-level Mediterranean-inspired design with a prominent octagonal turret capped by a steep, reddish-brown roof. The main structure is built with light-colored stone or stucco, adorned with arched windows and decorative balconies. A central staircase leads up to a formal entryway, flanked by a circular fountain and manicured landscaping, including symmetrical rows of trees and flowering shrubs. The upper level includes open terraces with railings, outdoor seating, and garden elements, while the lower level is characterized by a series of arched openings. The house is surrounded by a circular arrangement of trees, enhancing its stately presence. Architectural details such as columns, balustrades, and ornamental trim add to the luxurious and classical aesthetic.
description: A grand Mediterranean-style house with a turret, arched windows, balconies, and landscaped gardens, featuring a central fountain and ornate architectural details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, entryway, central fountain, and symmetrical landscaping with the turret on the right.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the octagonal turret, arched lower level, and surrounding trees, with less emphasis on the main entry.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof sections, upper terraces, and symmetrical tree arrangement, with the turret on the left.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the fountain, entry steps, turret, and a mix of open terraces and arched windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with arched windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Grand staircase entry with double doors, flanked by columns, a central fountain, and decorative landscaping
